prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: Conveyor systems is observed during operation after the reported concern was checked. Readings are steady, no abnormal sound or heat is noted, and the maintenance log shows the standard functional check was completed with no open punch note. Reference material on hand: CEMA, OSHA 1910.212.
title: Fault diagnosis: Conveyor systems (industrial site)
